blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,351 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 10".
